seo_title: Best Desk Plants for a Home Office
seo_description: A living desk plant alternative to plastic decor — real greenery, custom pots, and honest context for your home office. Rebecca: refine this description.

faqs.q: Do I need a sunny window?
faqs.a: Indirect light is enough for most Desk Plants varieties. A desk near a window works well; a completely dark room does not.

faqs.q: How much care do they need?
faqs.a: Occasional watering and indirect light. They are chosen to be hard-to-kill, not zero-maintenance.
